positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a whimsical woodland scene at dusk. The central elements include stylized bioluminescent flora, including large, gently glowing mushroom clusters and exotic ferns with glowing edges. Scattered throughout the scene are stylized, silhouetted animals (foxes, owls, deer) in various dynamic poses, integrated naturally into the foliage. The overall color palette should be rich deep indigos, midnight blues, emerald greens, and pops of neon cyan/lime green from the bioluminescence. Use negative space effectively for a clean, print-friendly silhouette effect. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, vector illustration style, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central composition.
